title: carpinus hupeana var. henryana
intro: Carpinus hupeana var. henryana, also known as the Chinese or Henry's hop hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Carpinus hupeana var. henryana include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
